Launched a prominent anti-degen / anti-casino crusade in Dec 2023 — explicitly attacking memecoins, 100x leverage, yield farming, airdrop farming, and 'casino' speculation as the 'primary force holding the space back' (new, sharply-stated quality/purpose stance not anticipated)
